title: Navigating the Moral Landscape of AI: A Decision-Making Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the key ethical considerations and decision points for developing and deploying responsible AI systems within public policy.
elements: Core Ethical Principles (e.g., Justice, Beneficence, Autonomy)
relationships: Core Ethical Principles inform the design of an AI System, which is then analyzed for Potential Harms & Benefits. This analysis feeds into a Stakeholder Impact Assessment, the results of which determine the application of specific Governance & Policy Levers. These levers guide the final Deployment & Monitoring of the system, creating a feedback loop for continuous ethical evaluation.
